description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a pull-tab top, featuring a bold and colorful design. The main colors are neon green and hot pink, with a large stylized cheetah face graphic dominating the front. The words 'Cheetah Chug' are prominently displayed in a graffiti-like font across the cheetah's forehead and below its face. One side of the can displays a barcode and a large black recycling symbol, while the other side continues the abstract color pattern. The can's surface appears metallic and glossy, typical of beverage containers, and the overall design is eye-catching and urban-themed.
description: A tall, metallic can with a vibrant neon green and pink cheetah-themed design, featuring bold graphics and text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cheetah face graphic and 'Cheetah Chug' text in black and pink on a neon background.
description_view_1: Side view with a partial cheetah face, abstract color patterns, and the edge of a barcode and recycling symbol visible.
description_view_2: Back view highlighting the large black recycling symbol, barcode, and more of the neon green and pink pattern.
description_view_3: Side view with the cheetah face partially visible and the 'Cheetah Chug' text wrapping around the can.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized cheetah face with the words 'Cheetah Chug' in graffiti-style font, located on the front of the can, in black and pink.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A barcode is visible on the side, but no detailed nutritional information is present.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The cheetah mascot graphic on the front serves as a promotional visual, but there are no special offers or limited edition markings.
